what_i_changed: game/entities/buildings/economic.py: Inn.on_hero_enter deducts entry fee (hero.gold, up to INN_ENTRY_FEE); Blacksmith.on_hero_enter/on_hero_exit call super() for occupant tracking (WK18-BUG-001).
game/entities/hero.py: In update_resting and in update (brief inside), when inside_building is Inn: deduct loiter fee each tick; if hero.gold < 1 call pop_out_of_building() (WK18-FEAT-002).
game/cleanup_manager.py: Before removing destroyed buildings, eject all occupants via hero.pop_out_of_building() (WK18-BUG-002).
tests/test_hero.py: test_inn_resting_tracks_hero_entry_exit_and_fast_heal_rate sets hero.gold=20 so hero can rest with Inn fee.
how_to_test: Manual: hero at Inn with low gold gets ejected when gold < 1; destroy building with hero inside, hero pops to adjacent tile.

what_i_changed: game/events.py: GameEventType.LLM_REQUEST, LLM_RESPONSE for Agent 12 data tap.
game/ui/dev_tools_panel.py: DevToolsPanel subscribes to llm_request/llm_response, shows scrolling color-coded log (request=blue, response=green, error=red), F4 toggle.
game/engine.py: create dev_tools_panel with event_bus; render after debug_panel.
game/input_handler.py: F4 toggles dev_tools_panel; handle_click consumes clicks inside panel.
how_to_test: Run game, press F4: Dev Tools overlay appears (bottom-right) with title 'AI/LLM Log (F4 to close)'. Press F4 again to close.
When Agent 12 wires data tap: events llm_request/llm_response will stream into the panel with color-coding.
